description: Non-realtime online room alpha rules. This file defines room sync policy only and does not define combat effects.

officialEndpoint.label: 官方联机服务器
notes: 当前已配置站长部署的 Cloudflare Worker。
workers.dev 在部分国内网络可能显示 Failed to fetch；如需覆盖国内玩家，请在 mainlandMirrorUrls 填入共用同一房间数据的国内 HTTPS 镜像。
官方联机服务器只同步 room JSON，不调用 AI，也不接收 API key。

localMock.label: 本地 mock（开发/双标签测试）
notes: 只适合同一浏览器或双标签测试。

customEndpoint.label: 自定义 Endpoint（高级）
customEndpoint.requestBody: { protocol, operation, roomId, playerId, side, payload, siteVersion }
notes: Both players must use the same endpoint.
Invite links do not include endpoint URLs or secrets.
The endpoint stores room JSON and does not receive API keys or AI settings.
Alpha room sync defaults to official_endpoint for普通玩家；local_mock_backend is retained for development and same-browser testing.
No WebSocket, account system, matchmaking, leaderboard, chat, server-authoritative anticheat, or full replay is included.
Online sync must not change AP, CE, trial, jackpot, domain, card effect, wheel pointer, or sound behavior.
Room snapshots must not contain API keys, BYOK settings, proxy endpoint secrets, raw AI responses, or full localStorage dumps.
